headline.text: L1 found a flashlight top on the production belt at 04:14 — line stopped, part recovered, source flashlight identified.

per_plant_summary.L1: Ran Mondelez Oreo trial on Sollich 2 through the day, completed by 19:00. Multiple belt tracking issues on both S2 and S3 required maintenance burns and cleaning; all cleared same-shift. Foreign material flag: flashlight top found under Tunnel 2 belt at 04:14, part recovered and matched to a production-area flashlight.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS film tore at 00:40 due to score mark on new roll, down 89 minutes. Long seal jaw screw backed off at 16:46, fixed in 6 minutes. ML3 vacuum plate degrading, swapped temporarily. Hersheys Peco pallets running low at 170, delivery ETA requested.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 ran smoothly after clearing a C6 belt sensor drift at 04:31. ML4 continues to fight TG3 kickoff timing — scrap and rework still elevated at shift end despite belt cleaning and spacing adjustments. Caramel weight high at 06:35, team making adjustments.

resolved.title: S2 and S3 metal detector not rejecting on time
resolved.summary: MD failed to reject test card promptly during shift check.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:06 — "Maintenance cleared all the faults and reset MD. It is working and we are running" (Katya Farnsworth).

resolved.title: S2 and S3 C20 belt edge raised, tracking off
resolved.summary: Belt edge lifted and drifted, required trimming.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:29 — "C-20 conveyor belt has been trimmed, tracked and scraper been adjusted. Turned over ops." (Lolo Bencomo)

resolved.title: S2 and S3 cross conveyor 1 tracking off
resolved.summary: East side of cross conveyor drifted, maintenance burned edges.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:11 — "The cross conveyor sides were burned off by maintenance. We did an ATP test and sanitized it, and have resumed operations." (S3 Enrober)

resolved.title: S2 and S3 kitchen fault
resolved.summary: Kitchen system faulted during Oreo trial and caramel depositing.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:14 — "Maintenance pushed the reset button" and "We have resumed depositing." (Caleb York, William Beattie)

resolved.title: S3 Z-conveyor tie-down clip missing
resolved.summary: Clip fell off during pre-start inspection before production began.
resolved.resolution: Caught at 07:45 before startup, line did not run with missing part.

resolved.title: FFS gusset seal punch wrong, line down
resolved.summary: Wrong punch installed, maintenance called to swap.

resolved.title: FFS long seal jaw screw backed off, jaw fell
resolved.summary: Screw loosened over time, jaw assembly dropped mid-run.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:53 — "The screw on the long seal jaw backed itself off over time. This caused the long seal jaw to fall off. The line is back up and running again." (Brandon Lance)

resolved.title: FFS film tear during splice
resolved.summary: New film roll had a score mark; tore while threading through machine.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:57 — "Line is back up. Film breakage looks to be cause by score mark on new film rool… Total DT for film tear was 89 minutes." (Zack Kurtz)

resolved.title: ML3 flow wrap issue requiring CIL
resolved.summary: Flow wrapper problem forced line down for clean-in-line at shift start.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:19 — "Line running since 3:02" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML2 display boxes V2 on hold, V3 substitution needed
resolved.summary: V2 displays received on hold; located V3 displays mislabeled in system as V2.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 03:55 — "Item# 40916 V3… was approved by the Quality department." (Jose Cabrera)

resolved.title: ML2 cooler jam
resolved.summary: Product jam in belt cooler during 10ct MX run.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:36 — "Line is up and running." (ML2 Depositor)

resolved.title: C6 belt sensor drifting north, causing blow-offs
resolved.summary: Sensor moved out of alignment and triggered false rejects on ML1 molding line.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 04:51 — "Maintenance, adjusted the sensor. Line is running good." (Raoul Lubain)

resolved.title: Depositor 4 molds with holes in bar corners
resolved.summary: Product fill incomplete at corners; viscosity adjustment needed on ML4.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 23:37 — viscosity lowered, issue resolved (Kimberly Morales and training operator).

needs_attention.title: S3 flashlight top found on production belt
needs_attention.summary: Lead discovered flashlight cap on first roller after enrober at 03:50; part matched to production-area flashlight.
needs_attention.status: Line stopped at 04:14. Belt inspected; no other pieces found. Flashlight in production area identified as source. Part recovered.

needs_attention.title: S3 foreign material — bolt in tray pallet
needs_attention.summary: EE found a bolt inside a pallet of trays; believed to come from tray manufacturer, not CandyCo equipment.
needs_attention.status: Found at 21:27. Team confident bolt is not from building or equipment. QA escalating to procurement for component defect reporting.

needs_attention.title: S2 incorrect enrober infeed pipe still installed
needs_attention.summary: Wrong feed pipe in enrober; correct pipe was cleaned and staged but swap deferred until next reheat.
needs_attention.status: Identified at 15:43. Correct pipe cleaned, sanitized, ATP tested. Follow-up action created to install after next reheat. Conflicting messages from Luis Falcon stating correct pipe was installed Saturday.

needs_attention.title: Hersheys Peco pallet inventory running low
needs_attention.summary: Down from 285 to 170 pallets in 21 hours; order placed but delivery ETA unknown.
needs_attention.status: Order confirmed placed at 09:41 on 6/22. By 06:27 on 6/23 down to 170 pallets; ETA requested but not provided by window close.

needs_attention.title: FFS open and double wrappers in boxes
needs_attention.summary: During run, operator observed open and double pieces in most boxes dumped to hopper.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 22:08. Sealer plastic nut checked twice by supervisors at 04:33, found tight and in good shape. No resolution posted.

needs_attention.title: ML3 vacuum plate on flow wrapper degrading
needs_attention.summary: Operators noticed vacuum plate starting to come apart; maintenance swapped with plate from different product set.
needs_attention.status: Temporary swap completed at 04:49. Running on substitute plate from different product; original plate needs replacement.

needs_attention.title: ML4 Theegarten 3 kickoff timing causing scrap
needs_attention.summary: TG3 reject system timing off — shoots early and between bars; belt cleaning and spacing helped but scrap and rework still elevated.
needs_attention.status: Preston emailed Theegarten for hidden parameters at 00:17. Belt cleaning and spacing adjustments made by 00:45. By 04:56 "TG3 still has blow offs however a lot less."

needs_attention.title: ML4 caramel weight too high
needs_attention.summary: Capture test showed caramel deposit over target; team adjusting depositor settings.
needs_attention.status: Adjustments in progress as of 06:35. No confirmation of target achievement by window close.
